title: The Beginning
overview: Those incompetent aliens are still plotting to conquer the Earth. The only obstacle in their path the giant, female robot ARIEL. When Kazumi receives a mysterious love letter from a secret admirer, she then wonders if she should cancel her first date just so she can save Earth.

title: Great Fall
overview: Those incompetent aliens are still plotting to conquer the Earth. The only obstacle in their path the giant, female robot ARIEL. When Kazumi receives a mysterious love letter from a secret admirer, she then wonders if she should cancel her first date just so she can save Earth.
